axioms.name: Compression produces authority
axioms.statement: Accumulated compression yields a default attractor route.
axioms.formula: repeat selection -> prune alternatives -> low-resistance route -> authority

axioms.name: Authority reduces DeltaPhi
axioms.statement: Authority lowers DeltaPhi variability and reduces decision or transition cost.

axioms.name: Over-compression accumulates misfit
axioms.statement: Excessive compression accumulates mismatch epsilon under environmental change or exception buildup.

axioms.name: Innovation is misfit-triggered re-opening
axioms.statement: When epsilon crosses a threshold, re-opening O is forced and appears as innovation.

axioms.name: Conflict is phase signal
axioms.statement: Authority-innovation conflict is a transition signal tau, not a moral dispute.

axioms.name: Coupled propagation in CE
axioms.statement: In CE, rigidity or re-opening on one side shifts epsilon, tau, and D_A on the other side and can trigger system-level regime shifts.
